title: Mexican Corn Salad
description: A delicious and crunchy salad made with a mix of corn, crunchy components, and Mexican flavors.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the corn kernels, crunchy tortilla strips, diced red bell pepper, and diced cilantro.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice and a pinch of salt and pepper.
3. Pour the lime dressing over the corn mixture and toss to combine.
4. Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
